Interface ICadTransformations

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesFile
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesFile.dll

Provides access to members that control Cad Transformations.

[Guid("E37F71AB-BFB1-11D2-9B20-00C04FA33299")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICadTransformations

Properties

EnableTransformations

Indicates if global transformations are enabled.

bool EnableTransformations { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TransformMode

The transformation type.

esriCadTransform TransformMode { get; set; }

Property Value

esriCadTransform

Examples

Sample Snippet

WorldFileName

The pathname of the world file.

string WorldFileName { get; set; }

Property Value

string
